change.head: demo-refactor-head
change.summary: Extract an _is_active helper from renew, presented as a pure readability refactoring

intent.statement: The refactoring claims to preserve renewal behavior exactly

evidence.supports: The change description says readability only, with no intended behavior change

invariants.statement: A membership that has not passed its end date can renew

unresolved.statement: Whether renewal on the exact end date is inside the term
unresolved.test_impact: Decides the oracle of the end-date probe and whether the observed diff is a regression
